title: Flitter (disambiguation)
content:
'''Flitter''' can refer to several things:

*"[[Flitter]]," colloquial terminology used to refer to [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]]
*[[Flitter (planet)|Flitter]], a one-time [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Safe world/Legends|safe world]]
*[[Shamarok flitter]]

{{Disambig}}
